---
title: "Week 12: AI-Assisted Development"
subtitle: "Human-AI Collaboration Patterns"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Reading Assignment
Complete this reading before Week 13.
:::

## Overview

*Content coming soon.*

## Key Concepts

- AI coding assistants
- Prompt engineering for development
- AI-generated testing
- Evaluating AI-generated code

## Further Reading

- [ElastiCache](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonElastiCache/latest/dg/WhatIs.html)
- [Caching with Redis](https://redis.io/solutions/caching/)
- [Caching Patterns](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/database-caching-strategies-using-redis/caching-patterns.html)
- [What is a CDN](https://www.cloudflare.com/learning/cdn/what-is-a-cdn/)
- [What is Caching](https://www.cloudflare.com/learning/cdn/what-is-caching/)
- [Load Balancing](https://docs.nginx.com/nginx/admin-guide/load-balancer/http-load-balancer/)
